azcam

  • Console API
Next Previous

Console API¶

The api_console class contains a command set which can be called from a console application to send the equivalent command to a server process. Commands are typically accessed in and console process as azcam.api.commandname(parameters), e.g. azcam.api.get_wavelength().

class API¶

Bases: azcam.api_azcam.API

API interface for console application.

connect(host='localhost', port=2402)¶

Connect to azcamserver.

delete_keyword(keyword, key_object='controller')¶

Delete a keyword from a header. The keyword is set in the controller header by default.

Parameters

  • keyword (str) – keyword name

  • key_object (str) – object to which keyword belongs

Return type

Optional[str]

get_keyword(keyword, key_object='controller')¶

Return a keyword value and its comment. The comment always returned in quotes, even if empty. Hardware is not usually read by this commands, use update_header first.

Parameters

  • keyword (str) – keyword name

  • key_object (str) – object to which keyword belongs

Return type

str

rcommand(command, **kwargs)¶

Send a command to a server process using the ‘server’ object in the database. This command traps all errors and returns exceptions and as error string.

Returns None or a string.

read_header(object_name='controller')¶

Reads each keyword in the header and returns the keyword value. Returns a list of header lists: [[keyword, value, comment, type]].

restore_imagepars(imagepars, folder='')¶

Restore image parameters from dictionary. imagepars is a dictionary set with save_imagepars().

save_imagepars(imagepars={})¶

Save current image parameters. imagepars is a dictionary.

set_keyword(keyword, key_value, key_comment='', key_type='str', key_object='controller')¶

Set a keyword value and comment.

The keyword is set in the controller header by default.

Parameters

  • keyword (str) – keyword name

  • key_value (str) – keyword value

  • key_comment (str) – comment string for keyword

  • key_type (str) – keyword type

  • key_object (str) – object to which keyword belongs

Return type

Optional[str]

update_header(object_name='controller')¶

Update the header of an object. This command usually reads hardware to get the lastest keyword values.

Parameters

object_name (str) – object to which keyword belongs
